section.heading: U.S. Hostage and Wrongful Detainee Day

subsection.heading: Designation.—
subsection.content: March 9 is U.S. Hostage and Wrongful Detainee Day.

subsection.heading: Proclamation.—
subsection.content: The President is requested to issue each year a proclamation calling on the people of the United States to observe U.S. Hostage and Wrongful Detainee Day with appropriate ceremonies and activities.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 118–31, div. A, title XVIII, § 1804(a)(1)(A)(ii), Dec. 22, 2023, 137 Stat. 686.)
